criteria.name: Total sales calculation
criteria.description: Correct calculation of total sales (formula or value acceptable)

criteria.name: LOOKUP function
criteria.description: Correct use of VLOOKUP or XLOOKUP

criteria.name: Summary section
criteria.description: Presence of a clear summary sheet with calculated results

criteria.name: Data handling
criteria.description: Dataset is handled correctly without errors

instructions: Evaluate based on Excel functionality and correctness. Ignore minor grammar issues. Do not give marks if functions are missing or incorrectly applied.
